source_records.source_quote: Applying to the Bachelor of Music program requires an audition; each graduate program has its own admissions process.
The prepared piece must be performed live, last three to five minutes, and be performed on the applicant's primary instrument.
The Fall Regular Action application deadline is January 15; Early Action applications are due November 1.
Recommended BM minimums are TOEFL 72, IELTS 6.0, Duolingo 110, or PTE Academic 48.
